close() - Method in interface com.ifta.candidate.test.interfaces.DataFile

D

DataFile - Interface in com.sensordata.candidate.test.interfaces
Interface for a class providing data from a binary file.

Enum defining the data types.

G

getDataCount() - Method in interface com.ifta.candidate.test.interfaces.DataFile
Return the number (M) of data sets stored in the currently opened file.

getSignals() - Method in interface com.ifta.candidate.test.interfaces.DataFile

getUnit() - Method in interface com.ifta.candidate.test.interfaces.Signal
 

O

open(File) - Method in interface com.ifta.candidate.test.interfaces.DataFile
Open the given file and read the meta data, e.g. contained signals.

R

read(Signal) - Method in interface com.ifta.candidate.test.interfaces.DataFile
Return Iterable for the given signal to access its data.

S

Signal - Interface in com.sensordata.candidate.test.interfaces
Class defining the signal properties.

V

Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum com.ifta.candidate.test.interfaces.DataType
